theme_and_context.theme: Samsung Brand Theme - Clean, Minimalist, Persona-based Recommender
theme_and_context.description: A high-end, persona-based e-commerce / recommendation engine. Must evoke trust, premium quality, and simplicity. Focus on white space, soft shadows, rounded elements, and vivid Samsung Blue accents.

headings.notes: No Inter, Roboto, Open Sans, or Lato for headings.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-gray-900
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-gray-900

primary.description: Samsung's electric blue. Use for primary buttons, active states, and brand accents.

secondary.description: Pure black for high-contrast e-commerce headings and primary action text if needed.

1_landing_page.layout: Two-column hero (md:grid-cols-2). Massive H1 heading. Playful 3D-ish phone renders on the right.
1_landing_page.elements: 4 Trust badges row below hero (small icons + text). 'Get Started' primary CTA pill.

2_choose_mode.layout: Centered container. Grid with 2 massive interactive cards (md:grid-cols-2).
2_choose_mode.elements: Cards for 'Choose Persona' vs 'Chat with Galaxy AI'. Strong hover scale and shadow.

3_select_persona.elements: 8 Persona cards (Student, Professional, Creator, Gamer, Traveller, Business Executive, Parent/Family, Tech Enthusiast). Illustrated characters centered in rounded-3xl cards with subtle borders.

4_persona_experience.layout: Sidebar (col-span-1) with Needs/Budget/Preferences/Summary list. Main content (col-span-3) with 6 Need cards.
4_persona_experience.elements: Needs cards (grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3) with icons (All-day Battery, Performance, Camera, Display, Storage, Durability, Entertainment, Budget). Active states get blue border and checkmark.

5_chat_with_galaxy_ai.layout: Sidebar (col-span-1) for History/Recommendations/Compare/Saved. Main area (col-span-3) for Chat interface.
5_chat_with_galaxy_ai.elements: Mascot bot avatar, user/bot chat bubbles, input field with send button.

6_recommendations.elements: Cards contain: Match % badge (green pill top right), Phone image, Title, Features list, Price, 'View Details' primary button.

7_product_detail.layout: Two-column product split. Left: Large image gallery. Right: Specs and actions.
7_product_detail.elements: Specs pills (Battery, Processor, Camera, Display). 'Why we recommend' sections.

8_reviews_and_gallery.layout: Tabbed interface: Overview | Specifications | Reviews | Gallery | Compare.
8_reviews_and_gallery.elements: Reviews tab shows 4.6/5 rating bars. Gallery shows user photo grid (grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4).

9_buy_options.layout: Vertical stack or grid of 3 store cards.
9_buy_options.elements: Store cards (Samsung, Amazon, Flipkart) showing logo, price, and 'Buy Now' button.

cards.base: bg-white rounded-3xl border border-gray-100 shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-[#1B4EFF] hover:bg-[#1428A0] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold transition-all shadow-[0_4px_14px_rgba(27,78,255,0.25)] focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-100 outline-none
buttons.secondary: bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 text-gray-900 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold transition-all focus:ring-4 focus:ring-gray-50 outline-none
buttons.outline: border-2 border-gray-200 hover:border-[#1B4EFF] text-gray-900 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold transition-all bg-transparent focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-50 outline-none

badges.match: bg-[#00C853] text-white text-xs font-extrabold uppercase tracking-widest px-3 py-1 rounded-full
badges.spec: bg-gray-50 text-gray-700 text-xs font-semibold px-4 py-2 rounded-full flex items-center gap-2 border border-gray-100

navigation.header: Sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-gray-100
navigation.sidebar_item: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50 hover:text-gray-900 font-medium transition-colors

icons.library: lucide-react for UI interactions. react-icons for specific brands (e.g., FaAmazon, SiFlipkart).

phones.description: Sleek modern Samsung phone on dark background
Close up camera array of phone

attributes.data_testid_rule: MANDATORY on all interactive and key informational elements. Use role-based kebab-case naming.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build standard multi-page flows as distinct React components with clear state management.
Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', 'Open Sans', 'Lato' for Headings. Stick strictly to 'Manrope' or 'Geist'.
Use react-icons for brand logos (Amazon, Flipkart). E.g., import { FaAmazon } from 'react-icons/fa'.
Ensure 'Match %' badge is bright green (#00C853) with white text, styled as a pill.
Implement the 'Samsung Blue' (#1B4EFF) as the dominant accent color for CTA buttons and active states.
Maintain high optical clarity: No muddy or completely transparent header backgrounds. Use backdrop-blur with white/80 overlay for sticky headers.
Cards MUST have rounded-3xl corners and soft, luxurious shadows. Avoid sharp edges.
Use generous padding (p-8, p-12) inside major layout containers.
Always apply hover micro-interactions (slight scale up, shadow increase) to cards and buttons.
Provide javascript file implementations (.js or .jsx), not TypeScript.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
NEVER use placeholder URLs (via.placeholder.com etc.). Use provided Unsplash links.
Use lucide-react or react-icons for icons. DO NOT use emojis as icons.
DO NOT apply global transitions like 'transition: all' in global CSS. Add transitions explicitly.
DO NOT center align the app container in App.css.
Ensure high contrast on interactive elements. Do NOT use completely transparent backgrounds for overlays.
